query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS hot_tier1_projects,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.discoveryStatus = 'send_ready_contact' THEN p.id END) AS tier1_send_ready_projects,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS total_send_ready_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.actionTier = 'tier1_actionable';

SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS hot_tier1_projects,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.discoveryStatus = 'send_ready_contact' THEN p.id END) AS tier1_send_ready_projects,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS total_send_ready_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.actionTier = 'tier1_actionable';
